OSHINOGO-IDOL_ADMIRATION.description: Cause {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage and draw {Cards:diff()} cards.

OSHINOGO-PASSION_STRIKE.description: Causes {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage and gains 2 [gold] temporary Shine[/gold].
OSHINOGO-RADIANT_BURST.title: Radiant
OSHINOGO-RADIANT_BURST.description: Causes {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to all enemies 2 times. Gain 1 point of [gold] for temporary Shine [/gold].
OSHINOGO-TEASE.title: Tease
OSHINOGO-TEASE.description: Causes {Damage:diff()} points of damage and gives {Vulnerable:diff()} layers of [gold] vulnerability to [/gold].
OSHINOGO-SIDE_GLANCE.title: Glance Sideways
OSHINOGO-SIDE_GLANCE.description: Causes {Damage:diff()} points of damage and gives {Weak:diff()} layer[gold]weakness[/gold]
OSHINOGO-INFECTIOUS_PASSION.title: Enthusiasm Contagious
OSHINOGO-INFECTIOUS_PASSION.description: Causes {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage. If this card causes more than 9 points of damage, it will gain 1 point of [gold] round to Shine [/gold].
OSHINOGO-HEART_FLUTTER_ATTACK.title: Cardiac Attack
OSHINOGO-HEART_FLUTTER_ATTACK.descriptio: Causes {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to a single enemy. If the damage caused is greater than {Threshold:diff()}, {RefundEnergy:diff()} points will be refunded.
OSHINOGO-FLASH_BEAT.title: Flash Beat
OSHINOGO-FLASH_BEAT.description: Causes {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage. If you used [gold] Shine [/gold] this round, it will cause additional {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage.
OSHINOGO-SCARLET_ENCORE.title: Red Return
OSHINOGO-SCARLET_ENCORE.description: Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to all enemies. If a card is drawn this round, it will be dealt 2 times instead.
OSHINOGO-REHEARSAL.title: Dress Rehearsal
OSHINOGO-REHEARSAL.description: Causes {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage. Retrieve 1 shining card from the draw pile and put it into your hand.
OSHINOGO-SPINNING_STEP.title: Twirling Dance Steps
OSHINOGO-SPINNING_STEP.description: Randomly causes {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage to the enemy 3 times. If you have played 2 shining cards this round, change it to 4 times.
OSHINOGO-DOUBT.title: Suspect
OSHINOGO-DOUBT.description:
Causes {Damage:diff()} damage to a single enemy.
If the damage done is greater than {Threshold:diff()}, gain {Revenge:diff()} points[gold]Temporary Revenge[/gold].
OSHINOGO-SPIRIT_SURGE.title: Refreshed
OSHINOGO-SPIRIT_SURGE.description: Causes {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage to the enemy, and gains 3 [gold] temporary Shine[/gold] points in the next round.
OSHINOGO-IDOL_SONG.title: Idol Singing
OSHINOGO-IDOL_SONG.description: Causes {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage to all enemies and gains 2 points of [gold] Shine [/gold] for turns.
OSHINOGO-VENGEANCE_BELL.title: Revenge Bells
OSHINOGO-VENGEANCE_BELL.description: Lose {SelfDamage:diff()} points of life, causing all enemies to lose 10 points of life, and lose another 10 points of life at the beginning of the next round. Gain {Revenge:diff()} points[gold]temporary Revenge[/gold].
OSHINOGO-PAIN.title: Illness
OSHINOGO-RECKLESS_CHARGE.title: Move Forward Recklessly
OSHINOGO-RECKLESS_CHARGE.description: Cause {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage 2 times, consume 1 card, and obtain [gold]temporary Revenge[/gold] equal to the cost of the card.
OSHINOGO-STAGE_CRASH.title: Stage Fall
OSHINOGO-STAGE_CRASH.description: Causes {Damage:diff()} points of damage to all enemies, loses 2 points of life, and gains 2 points of [gold]Revenge[/gold].
OSHINOGO-SCATTERED_LIGHT.title: Scattered Light
OSHINOGO-SCATTERED_LIGHT.description: Cause {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage, draw 3 cards, and play 1 shining card for free.
OSHINOGO-FINAL_POSE.title: Final Act
OSHINOGO-FINAL_POSE.description: It can only be played if [gold] Shines [/gold] greater than 3. Causes {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage and gives 2 layers of [gold] vulnerability to [/gold].
OSHINOGO-STARFALL_OATH.title: Starfall Oath
OSHINOGO-STARFALL_OATH.description: It can only be played if [gold] Shines [/gold] greater than 6. Causes {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage. Gain 2 energy points next turn.
OSHINOGO-IDOL_CONFIDENCE.title: Idol Confidence
OSHINOGO-IDOL_CONFIDENCE.description: Cause {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage and gain {Shine:diff()} points for [gold] rounds of shining [/gold].
OSHINOGO-RUBY_SHINE.title: Ruby Sparkle
OSHINOGO-RUBY_SHINE.description: Causes {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage{ShinePlays:diff()} times. Each time [gold] Shine[/gold] is used in this battle, the number of attacks will be +1.
OSHINOGO-SPIKES_OF_LIES.title: Spikes Of Lies
OSHINOGO-SPIKES_OF_LIES.description: Loses 2 health, removes all enemy artifacts, and adds {Vulnerable:diff()} layers of [gold]vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]weak[/gold].
OSHINOGO-MIRROR_STAGE.title: Mirror Stage
OSHINOGO-MIRROR_STAGE.description: Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} points[gold] to block[/gold], and reflect all damage caused by [gold]block[/gold] this round.
OSHINOGO-PLACE_OF_LIGHT.title: Where The Light Is
OSHINOGO-PLACE_OF_LIGHT.description: For every 1 point of [gold] Shine[/gold], the card's cost is reduced by 1. Causes {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage to the enemy. If the cost becomes 0, gain 1 energy point.
OSHINOGO-CODE_B.title: Password B
OSHINOGO-CODE_B.description: Cause {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage to all enemies 3 times, and gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} points of defense 3 times.
OSHINOGO-RUBY_DEFEND.title: Defense
OSHINOGO-PASSION_DEFENSE.title: Passionate Defense
OSHINOGO-PASSION_DEFENSE.description: Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} defense points and 2 [gold] temporary Shine[/gold] points.
OSHINOGO-MIYA_A_DREAM.title: Meimi A Dream
OSHINOGO-BACKSTAGE_SUPPORT.title: Behind The Scenes Preparation
OSHINOGO-BACKSTAGE_SUPPORT.description: Get {Block:diff()} points[gold] to block[/gold], and get 1 point[gold] in the next round to Shine[/gold].
OSHINOGO-SMALL_TRICK.title: Small Action
OSHINOGO-SMALL_TRICK.description: Gain {Block:diff()} points[gold]Block[/gold]. Choose a card from the discard pile and place it on top of the draw pile.
OSHINOGO-AQUA_CALL.title: Brother's Support
OSHINOGO-CHEER_UP.title: Cheer Up
OSHINOGO-FIRST_APPEARANCE.title: Debut
OSHINOGO-FIRST_APPEARANCE.description: Obtain {Block:diff()} points[gold] to block[/gold], and add 1 stun card to the deck.
OSHINOGO-BREATH_CONTROL.title: Breath Control
OSHINOGO-BREATH_CONTROL.description: Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} points[gold]Block[/gold]. The next shining card in your hand costs -1.
OSHINOGO-DECEIVE.title: Cheat
OSHINOGO-DECEIVE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} points[gold]Block[/gold]. If you have lost life this round, gain 1 point of [gold] Temporary Revenge [/gold].
OSHINOGO-ONLINE_BACKLASH.title: Internet Inflammation
OSHINOGO-ONLINE_BACKLASH.description: Lose 1 life point and gain {Revenge:diff()} points[gold]temporary Revenge[/gold]. Draw 1 card.
OSHINOGO-TRUE_WORDS.title: Tell The Truth
OSHINOGO-TRUE_WORDS.description: Removes all defenses from an enemy. If its defense is greater than 15, gain 1 point [gold] Shine [/gold] and draw 1 card.
OSHINOGO-FIRM_BELIEF.title: Firm Belief
OSHINOGO-FIRM_BELIEF.description: Convert [gold] temporary Shine [/gold] to [gold] turn Shine [/gold], and convert [gold] turn Shine [/gold] to [gold] permanent Shine[/gold].
OSHINOGO-ACT_CUTE.title: Acting Cute
OSHINOGO-ACT_CUTE.description: In the next round, you will get no entity and cannot play cards. After the next round, restore {Heal:diff()} points of life.
OSHINOGO-NO_WAY_BACK.title: No Way Back
OSHINOGO-NO_WAY_BACK.description: Randomly consume 1 card in your hand to gain {Block:diff()} points[gold]Block[/gold].
OSHINOGO-IDOL_DISGUISE.title: Idol Disguise
OSHINOGO-IDOL_DISGUISE.description: For each enemy on the field, gain additional {CalculatedBlock:diff()} points[gold]Block[/gold].
OSHINOGO-DAILY_ACCUMULATION.title: Over Time And Over Time
OSHINOGO-DAILY_ACCUMULATION.description: Obtain [gold]Block[/gold] from the total of [gold]Shine[/gold] and [gold]Revenge[/gold] obtained in this game.
OSHINOGO-IDOL_PASSION.title: Idol Passion
OSHINOGO-IDOL_PASSION.description: Gain {Shine:diff()} points for [gold] turns and Shine [/gold].
OSHINOGO-SWITCH_TO_VENGEANCE.title: Broken Stage
OSHINOGO-SWITCH_TO_VENGEANCE.description: Lose 2 life points and gain {Block:diff()} points[gold]Block[/gold]. If you have lost life this round, draw 3 cards.
OSHINOGO-SWITCH_TO_SHINE.title: Heartfelt Response
OSHINOGO-COLD_SMILE.title: Sneer
OSHINOGO-COLD_SMILE.description: Lose 1 life point, gain {Block:diff()} point [gold] block [/gold], gain 1 [gold] temporary Revenge [/gold] point.
OSHINOGO-DOCTOR_BONES.title: Doctor Skeleton
OSHINOGO-DOCTOR_BONES.description: Convert all of your [gold]Shine[/gold] into [gold]Revenge[/gold]. Gain the same amount of energy and lose 2 life points.
OSHINOGO-SIBLINGS_REUNITED.title: Brother And Sister Recognize Each Other
OSHINOGO-SIBLINGS_REUNITED.description: Convert all of your [gold]Revenge[/gold] into [gold]Shine[/gold]. Draw an equal number of cards and gain {Block:diff()} points[gold]Block[/gold].
OSHINOGO-NEVER_GIVE_UP.title: Never Admit Defeat
OSHINOGO-NEVER_GIVE_UP.description: Gain 2 points for [gold] Shine [/gold] and gain 15 [gold] for Block [/gold]. If you have used [gold] Shine[/gold] this round, gain 1 energy point.
OSHINOGO-MOTHERS_LIE.title: Mother's Lies
OSHINOGO-MOTHERS_LIE.description: Gain 3 points in [gold] turn to take Revenge [/gold]. If you lose life every time this round, all enemies will lose 5 life points.
OSHINOGO-CAREFUL_PLAN.title: Careful Planning
OSHINOGO-CAREFUL_PLAN.description: Choose 1 card from 5 cards and place it on the top of the draw pile. In the next round, you will get an additional 2 points of energy and [gold] turn Shine[/gold].
OSHINOGO-BACKSTAGE_LIVE.title: Behind The Scenes
OSHINOGO-HONEST_STAGE.title: Sincere Stage
OSHINOGO-HONEST_STAGE.description: Gain 2 points of [gold] Shine [/gold]. If the current [gold] Shines [/gold] greater than 4, gain 2 points of energy.
OSHINOGO-SHADOW_ECHO.title: Shadow Echo
OSHINOGO-SHADOW_ECHO.description: Gain 2 points of [gold]Revenge[/gold]. If the current [gold]Revenge[/gold] is greater than 3, draw 2 cards.
OSHINOGO-DISDAIN.title: Contempt
OSHINOGO-SPOTLIGHT_SHARE.title: Spotlight Exclusive
OSHINOGO-SPOTLIGHT_SHARE.description: All teammates gain 1 energy point and draw 1 card.
OSHINOGO-ACT_SPOILED.title: Behave In A Spoiled Manner
OSHINOGO-ACT_SPOILED.description: All teammates are restored to {Heal:diff()} points of life, and you are restored to {Heal:diff()} points of life.
OSHINOGO-BURNED_LETTER.title: Burnt Letter
OSHINOGO-BURNED_LETTER.description: Remove all negative effects from teammates. Next round you and all teammates gain {Energy:diff()} energy points.
OSHINOGO-REBIRTH.title: Rebirth
OSHINOGO-REBIRTH.description: Wash away all buffs from yourself and restore 10 points of life.
OSHINOGO-CHASING_LIGHT.title: Chasing The Light
OSHINOGO-CHASING_LIGHT.description: For every {Threshold:diff()} point [gold] Shines [/gold] used, 1 energy point is obtained.
OSHINOGO-FLEEING_LIGHT.title: Fleeing From Light
OSHINOGO-FLEEING_LIGHT.description: For every {Threshold:diff()} point[gold]Revenge[/gold] used, draw 1 card.
OSHINOGO-LAST_MINUTE_STUDY.title: Final Review
OSHINOGO-LAST_MINUTE_STUDY.description: When playing a skill card, gain 1 point [gold] temporary Shine [/gold].
OSHINOGO-STAY_INDOORS.title: Stay Behind Closed Doors
OSHINOGO-STAY_INDOORS.description: At the end of the round, if you lost life this round, you will gain 2 [gold] Temporary Revenge [/gold] and 5 [gold] Block [/gold] points in the next round.
OSHINOGO-RUMOR_NETWORK.title: Rumor Network
OSHINOGO-RUMOR_NETWORK.description: When giving [gold] Weak[/gold] or [gold] Vulnerable[/gold] for the first time each round, draw {Threshold:diff()} cards.
OSHINOGO-STAGE_ARMOR.title: Stage Shell
OSHINOGO-STAGE_ARMOR.description: For every life point lost, gain {BlockPerHp:diff()} points[gold]Block[/gold].
OSHINOGO-DIE_ALONE.title: Die Alone
OSHINOGO-DIE_ALONE.description: Lose 2 health points and gain 3 points of [gold]Revenge[/gold]. When losing life for the first time each round, gain 8 [gold] block [/gold] points.
OSHINOGO-RUBY_LEGACY.title: Ruby's Legacy
OSHINOGO-RUBY_LEGACY.description: When you get [gold] Shine[/gold], get 3 points of [gold] block[/gold]. When gaining [gold]Revenge[/gold], lose 1 life and gain 8 [gold]Block[/gold].
OSHINOGO-SHELL_FORGED_BY_LIES.title: A Shell Made Of Lies
OSHINOGO-SHELL_FORGED_BY_LIES.descriptio: At the end of the round, cause [gold]Revenge[/gold]*6 damage to all enemies. If you have lost life this round, damage +8.
OSHINOGO-LIGHT_FROM_PASSION.title: The Light Of Passion
OSHINOGO-LIGHT_FROM_PASSION.description: At the end of the turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to [gold]Shine[/gold]*6.
OSHINOGO-RETREAT_BACKSTAGE.title: Escape Behind The Scenes
OSHINOGO-RETREAT_BACKSTAGE.description: When you get [gold]Revenge[/gold] for the first time each round, you get 2 points of energy and 10 points of [gold]Block[/gold].
OSHINOGO-TAKE_THE_STAGE.title: Get On Stage
OSHINOGO-TAKE_THE_STAGE.description: When you get [gold] Shine[/gold] for the first time each round, draw 2 cards and gain 6 points of [gold]Block[/gold].
OSHINOGO-IDOL_RADIANCE.title: Idol Light
OSHINOGO-IDOL_RADIANCE.description: Gain 2 points of [gold] Shine [/gold]. When you play a Shine card for the first time in each round, you will get 1 point of [gold] temporary Shine[/gold].
OSHINOGO-REVEAL_TRUTH.title: Reveal The Truth
OSHINOGO-REVEAL_TRUTH.description: Gain 2 points of [gold]Revenge[/gold]. At the beginning of the round, if your health is less than half, gain 1 point of [gold]Revenge[/gold].

OSHINOGO-INTERCEPT.title: To Meet
OSHINOGO-INTERCEPT.description: Causes {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage to all enemies and gains {CalculatedBlock:diff()} points of [gold] to block [/gold].
OSHINOGO-FARAWAY.title: Keep Away
OSHINOGO-FARAWAY.description: Inflict {Damage:diff()} points of damage to all enemies at the beginning of the next turn.
OSHINOGO-BLOOD_SWORD.title: Blood Stained Sword
OSHINOGO-BLOOD_SWORD.description: Cause {Damage:diff()} points of damage and gain 2 points of [gold] temporary Revenge[/gold].
OSHINOGO-NERVER_RETURN.title: Never Look Back
OSHINOGO-NERVER_RETURN.description: Consumes the void cards in your hand, causing {Damage:diff()} points of damage to all enemies for each consumed card.
OSHINOGO-DESOLATE_BATTLEFIELD.title: The Battlefield Is Deserted
OSHINOGO-DESOLATE_BATTLEFIELD.descriptio: Causes {Damage:diff()} points of damage to all enemies, and the enemies lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} points[gold]Strength[/gold] this round.
OSHINOGO-FIRE_ATTACK.title: Fire Draws Sword
OSHINOGO-FIRE_ATTACK.description: Cause {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage to the enemy 3 times.
OSHINOGO-KEEP_SHEATH.title: Keep The Scabbard
OSHINOGO-KEEP_SHEATH.description: Cause {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage and gain a cost equal to [gold] plot[/gold] layers.
OSHINOGO-LOOK_AT.title: Looking At Each Other
OSHINOGO-LOOK_AT.description: Causes {Damage:diff()} points of damage, gives {Vulnerable:diff()} layer [gold] vulnerability[/gold] and {Weak:diff()} layer [gold] weak[/gold].
OSHINOGO-STARE_AT.title: Stare~
OSHINOGO-STARE_AT.description: Causes {Damage:diff()} points of damage and grants {Rumor:diff()} layers of [gold]rumor[/gold].
OSHINOGO-PARRY.title: Parry
OSHINOGO-PARRY.description:
Causes {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage and gains {CalculatedBlock:diff()} points of [gold] to block [/gold].
[gold]Planning 1[/gold].
OSHINOGO-FULL_OF_ENTHUSIASM.title: Overflowing With Enthusiasm
OSHINOGO-FULL_OF_ENTHUSIASM.description:
Removes the enemy's defense, causing {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage.
[gold]Plan 1[/gold].
OSHINOGO-WEAPON_RACK.title: Weapon Rack
OSHINOGO-WEAPON_RACK.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} points of damage 2 times, and gain a blood-soaked petal for each unblocked damage caused.
OSHINOGO-BOND.title: Bond
OSHINOGO-BOND.description:
Gives all enemies {Rumor:diff()} layers of [gold] Rumor [/gold] and causes {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage.
[gold]Planning 1[/gold].
OSHINOGO-EVADE.title: Received
OSHINOGO-EVADE.description:
Cause {Damage:diff()} points of damage and draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
[gold]Plan 1[/gold].
OSHINOGO-POISED_TO.title: Ready To Go
OSHINOGO-POISED_TO.description: Cause {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage, choose a card in your hand and give it to Nothingness.
OSHINOGO-HATRED.title: Hatred
OSHINOGO-HATRED.description:
Deals {Damage:diff()} points of damage and doubles the number of stacks of all negative effects the enemy has.
[gold]Plan 1[/gold].
OSHINOGO-TOUKEN_RANBU.title: Touken Ranbu
OSHINOGO-DISPERSE_LIGHT.title: Dissipated Light
OSHINOGO-DISPERSE_LIGHT.description: Causes {Damage:diff()} points of damage, causing the opponent to lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} points of [gold] strength[/gold].
OSHINOGO-CLASH.title: Confrontation
OSHINOGO-CLASH.description: Causes {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage, and if the enemy's intention is to attack, causes {BonusDamage:diff()} points of damage.
OSHINOGO-ICE_AND_FIRE.title: Ice And Fire
OSHINOGO-ICE_AND_FIRE.description:
Causes {CalculatedDamage:diff()} points of damage to all enemies and gains {CalculatedBlock:diff()} points of [gold] to block [/gold].
[gold]Planning 1[/gold].
OSHINOGO-BITE_TIGHT.title: Bite Tightly
OSHINOGO-BITE_TIGHT.description:
Causes {Damage:diff()} points of damage to the enemy and gives {Trap:diff()} layers of [gold]traps[/gold].
[gold]Planning 2[/gold].
OSHINOGO-UNDER_THE_SEA.title: Fall Into The Sea
OSHINOGO-UNDER_THE_SEA.description: Causes {Damage:diff()} points of damage and dies in the next round.
OSHINOGO-DEUS_EX_MACHINA.title: Deus Ex Machina
OSHINOGO-POISED_TO.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose 1 card from your hand and give it to Nothingness.
